---
title: 'Olivier''s Thoughts On: "Is Depression A Spirit?"'
date: '2014-04-01T11:14:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3597642415018885967'
blogger_filename: '/2014/04/oliviers-thoughts-on-is-depression.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Word From God'
---

So this afternoon I sent my brother Olivier a Text Message:<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
My Text: "Depression is a spirit. Right? What are your thoughts future pastor?"</blockquote>
<br />
To this he replied by calling me twice, I was on another line, and sending me a text message<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
"Call Me"</blockquote>
So we talked by phone, what started as a quick call quickly turned into an hour. I could not recount it all here. I will remember and study out what he said in as much living color as I can remember.<br />
<br />
He started by telling me the very personal and very public story of his being delivered from depression. It involved Pastor Art and Ed Perez speaking, praying, and Olivier crying out his deliverance. It was touching but my flesh resisted the very idea, and my spirit yearned for a similar experience.<br />
<br />
The following information is not a word-for-word recount of what we talked about, but rather my regurgitation of what we talked about as I've been meditating it and digesting it. Thus this is my study of what we talked about instead.<br />
<br />
**********<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Is depression a spirit?&nbsp;</h4>
<br />
Well this questions is a bit related to the concept of a <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/False_dilemma" target="_blank">false dichotomy</a>. It assumes the answer is either yes or no. But the real answer is much more complicated, and in another sense much more simple.<br />
<br />
In the strict sense: "Is someone suffering depression demon possessed?" Probably not.<br />
<br />
"Is someone suffering depression demon influenced?" Definitely. But exactly how? How is that influence exerted?<br />
<br />
<h4>
All Things Are Spiritual</h4>
<br />
In fact, ALL things in life are spiritual. We ARE a Spirit, we HAVE a Mind, we LIVE IN a Body. For the "Human Being" created in God's image, ALL that we experience is spiritual at some level.<br />
<br />
The Human condition is that our experience of this world is primarily lived through the mind. Even pain and/or pleasure in the body must be translated through the mind. When we want to contact the spiritual world, it is with our spirit, yet our spirit must translate that into our mind, or it bears no fruit.<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Depression Cause In Bible</h4>
<br />
When I lived in the World the gods of that world helped to train my mind to respond to certain stimuli, and have certain responses. Then Olivier brings out this verse.<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<span style="font-size: large;"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/proverbs/12-25.html" target="_blank">Proverbs 12:25 (New King James Version)</a><br /><i>Anxiety in the heart of man causes depression, But a good word makes it glad.</i></span></blockquote>
<b>(What "it" is made glad? Your heart!)&nbsp;</b><br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
KJV Interlinear.<br />
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=01674" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">Heaviness</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;in the&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=03820" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">heart</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;of&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=0376" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">man</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;maketh it&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=07812" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">stoop</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;: but a&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=02896" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">good</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=01697" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">word</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;maketh it&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=h&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=08055" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">glad</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;.</span></blockquote>
<h4>
</h4>
<h4>
Let's dissect this verse. unpack it.&nbsp;</h4>
<br />
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/hebrew/kjv/deagah.html" target="_blank">Heaviness:&nbsp;<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px;">D@'agah</span></a><br />
<table style="background-color: white; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; width: 100%px;"><tbody>
<tr style="height: 20px;"><td colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>Definition</b></td></tr>
<tr style="height: 20px;"><td colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="1">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>anxiety</b>, anxious care, care</li>
</ol>
</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<table style="background-color: white; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; width: 100%px;"><tbody>
<tr style="height: 20px;"><td colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>King James Word Usage - Total:</b>&nbsp;6</td></tr>
<tr style="height: 20px;"><td align="top" colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>carefulness&nbsp;</b>2, fear&nbsp;1, heaviness&nbsp;1, sorrow&nbsp;1, with care&nbsp;1</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/hebrew/kjv/leb.html" target="_blank">Heart:&nbsp;<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px;">Leb</span></a><br />
<table style="background-color: white; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; width: 100%px;"><tbody>
<tr style="height: 20px;"><td colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;<b>Definition</b></td></tr>
<tr style="height: 20px;"><td colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="1">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">inner man, mind, will, heart, understanding<ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="a">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">inner part, midst<ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="1">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">midst (of things)</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>heart (of man)</b></li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>soul, heart (of man)</b></li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>mind, knowledge, thinking, reflection, memory</b></li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>inclination, resolution, determination (of will)</b></li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">conscience</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">heart (of moral character)</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">as seat of appetites</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">as seat of emotions and passions 1a</li>
</ol>
</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">as seat of courage</li>
</ol>
</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/hebrew/kjv/shachah.html" target="_blank">Stoop/Depression:&nbsp;<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px;">Shachah</span></a><br />
<table style="background-color: white; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; width: 100%px;"><tbody>
<tr style="height: 20px;"><td colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>Definition</b></td></tr>
<tr style="height: 20px;"><td colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="1">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">to bow down<ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="a">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">(Qal) to bow down</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">(Hiphil) to depress (fig)</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">(Hithpael)<ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="1">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">to bow down, prostrate oneself 1c</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">before superior in homage 1c</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">before God in worship 1c</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">before false gods 1c</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">before angel</li>
</ol>
</li>
</ol>
</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
So, being full-of-care (worry/anxiety) will cause your mind (knowledge, thinking, reflections, memories, inclinations, resolutions, and determinations) to depress, or bow down in homage or worship to that care. You will literally give your emotional state, physical actions, words, and imaginations over to it. This is a form of idol worship.&nbsp;</blockquote>
<br />
So in contrast:<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/hebrew/kjv/towb-2.html" target="_blank">Good:&nbsp;<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px;">Towb</span></a><br />
<table style="background-color: white; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; width: 100%px;"><tbody>
<tr style="height: 20px;"><td colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>Definition</b></td></tr>
<tr style="height: 20px;"><td colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">adj<br />
<ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="1">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>good, pleasant, agreeable</b><ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="a">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">pleasant, agreeable (to the senses)</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">pleasant (to the higher nature)</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">good, excellent (of its kind)</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">good, rich, valuable in estimation</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">good, appropriate, becoming</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">better (comparative)</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">glad, happy, prosperous (of man's sensuous nature)</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">good understanding (of man's intellectual nature)</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">good, kind, benign</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">good, right (ethical) n m</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">a good thing, benefit, welfare<ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="a">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">welfare, prosperity, happiness</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">good things (collective)</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">good, benefit</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">moral good n f</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">welfare, benefit, good things<ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="a">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">welfare, prosperity, happiness</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">good things (collective)</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">bounty</li>
</ol>
</li>
</ol>
</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/hebrew/kjv/dabar-2.html" target="_blank">Word:&nbsp;<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px;">Dabar</span></a><br />
<table style="background-color: white; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; width: 100%px;"><tbody>
<tr style="height: 20px;"><td colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;<b>Definition</b></td></tr>
<tr style="height: 20px;"><td colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="1">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">speech, word, speaking, thing<ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="a">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">speech</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>saying, utterance</b></li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">word, words</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">business, occupation, acts, matter, case, something, manner (by extension)</li>
</ol>
</li>
</ol>
</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
This indicates SPOKEN, not written.&nbsp;</blockquote>
<br />
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/hebrew/kjv/samach.html" target="_blank">Glad:&nbsp;<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px;">Samach</span></a><br />
<table style="background-color: white; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; width: 100%px;"><tbody>
<tr style="height: 20px;"><td colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>Definition</b></td></tr>
<tr style="height: 20px;"><td colspan="2" style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="1">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>to rejoice, be glad</b><ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="a">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">(Qal)<ol style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" type="1">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">to rejoice</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">to rejoice (arrogantly), exult (at)</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">to rejoice (religiously)</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">(Piel) to cause to rejoice, gladden, make glad</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">(Hiphil) to cause to rejoice, gladden, make glad</li>
</ol>
</li>
</ol>
</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
So a good, pleasant, and agreeable spoken word, saying, or utterance will make it (the heart) glad, rejoice, find joy again.&nbsp;</blockquote>
<br />
<br />
<h4>
So then. Anxiety is a form of worship. How do we worship?</h4>
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=Luke+10%3A27&amp;t=kjv" target="_blank">Luke 10:27</a><br />
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1161" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">And</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;he&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=611" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">answering</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2036" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">said</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;, Thou shalt&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=25" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">love</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;the&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2962" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">Lord</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=4675" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">thy</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2316" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">God</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1537" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">with</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=3650" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">all</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=4675" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">thy</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2588" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">heart,</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2532" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">and</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1537" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">with</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;"></span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=3650" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">all</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=4675" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">thy</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=5590" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">soul,</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2532" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">and</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1537" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">with</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=3650" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">all</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=4675" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">thy</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2479" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">strength,</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2532" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">and</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1537" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">with</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=3650" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">all</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=4675" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">thy</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1271" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">mind;</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2532" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">and</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=4675" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">thy</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=4139" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">neighbour</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=5613" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">as</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=4572" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">thyself.</a></blockquote>
<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px;"><b>SPIRIT&nbsp;</b></span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/greek/kjv/kardia.html" target="_blank">Heart: Kardia</a>:&nbsp;<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px;">the centre and seat of spiritual life (heart=center as in the heart of a tree is the center)&nbsp;</span><br />
<br />
<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px;"><b>EMOTIONS&nbsp;</b></span>Soul:Psuche: Breath,&nbsp;<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px;">the seat of the feelings, desires, affections, aversions.&nbsp;</span><br />
<br />
<span style="background-color: white;"><span style="color: #333333; font-family: arial;"><span style="font-size: 14px;"><b>ABILITY </b>TO OVERCOME&nbsp;RESISTANCE&nbsp;</span></span></span>Strength:Ischus: Ability, Force, Strength, Might<br />
<b style="background-color: #fdfeff; color: #001320; font-family: Trebuchet, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"><a href="http://biblehub.com/greek/2479.htm" target="_blank">2479</a></b><span style="background-color: #fdfeff; color: #001320; font-family: Trebuchet, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><i style="background-color: #fdfeff; color: #001320; font-family: Trebuchet, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;">is<smallcaps>x</smallcaps></i><span style="background-color: #fdfeff; color: #001320; font-family: Trebuchet, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;">ýs (from the Gk root&nbsp;</span><i style="background-color: #fdfeff; color: #001320; font-family: Trebuchet, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;">is</i><span style="background-color: #fdfeff; color: #001320; font-family: Trebuchet, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;">, "force" and 2192</span><i style="background-color: #fdfeff; color: #001320; font-family: Trebuchet, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;">/e<smallcaps>x</smallcaps>ō</i><span style="background-color: #fdfeff; color: #001320; font-family: Trebuchet, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;">, "have") – properly, force to overcoming&nbsp;</span><i style="background-color: #fdfeff; color: #001320; font-family: Trebuchet, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;">immediate resistance</i><span style="background-color: #fdfeff; color: #001320; font-family: Trebuchet, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;">.</span><br />
<br />
<span style="color: #333333; font-family: arial;"><span style="background-color: white; font-size: 14px;"><b>THOUGHTS</b>&nbsp;</span></span>Mind:Dianoia:&nbsp;<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px;">the mind as a faculty of understanding, feeling, desiring</span><br />
<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<b><br /></b><b>You will either bow down with you spirit, emotions, abilities, and thoughts to anxiety or to God. You can't do both.&nbsp;</b></blockquote>
<br />
<h4>
So where do we get GOOD thoughts to bow to?</h4>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<a href="http://biblehub.com/romans/12-2.htm" target="_blank">Romans 12:2</a>&nbsp;tells us:<br />
<i>Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind. Then you will be able to test and approve what God's will is--his good, pleasing and perfect will.</i></blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<br />
<b><a href="http://biblehub.com/matthew/6-31.htm" target="_blank">Matthew 6:31</a>&nbsp;tells us to "Take No Thought Saying..." You take thoughts by saying them.&nbsp;</b></blockquote>
<br />
<br />
..........<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
